raw_consumer_statement:
This is a follow-up to a complaint, XXXX. It had been closed in XXXX, XXXX after the CFPB contacted Barclays, who then decided there had been an attempt to use the card fraudulently. There is detailed information in that complaint. 

On or about XXXX XXXX, I received a letter from Barclays informing me their investigation was complete and I was not responsible. 
Since the card had been closed for months, I just filed the letter away. 

On XX/XX/XXXX I received a bill from Barclays for the original {$45.00} charge from the original merchant. Which Barclays has al ; ready concluded more than once the charge of {$45.00} was fraudulent. 
Copies attached.
